name: Macadamia Nut Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine egg, mashed bananas, melted butter, and pineapple fruit spread in a medium bowl.
3. Add flour, flaked coconut, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
4. Stir in chopped macadamia nuts.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Cool on wire racks.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
Nutrition information per cookie: 96 calories, 1 gm protein, 9 gm carbohydrate, 6 gm fat, 16 mg cholesterol, 83 mg sodium, 1/3 diabetic starch/bread exchange, 1-1/4 diabetic fat exchange, 1/4 diabetic fruit exchange.
